title: Phase 3C: Admin - role and permission management (list, detail, create, API, service)
description: Build role and permission management: role list page, role detail/edit with permission assignment matrix, create role dialog, role API routes, role service, and permission catalog page.
steps: Create src/lib/services/role.service.ts with role CRUD, permission assignment, role hierarchy
Create src/app/api/roles/route.ts with GET (list) and POST (create) endpoints
Create src/app/api/roles/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE endpoints
Create src/app/(dashboard)/admin/roles/page.tsx with role list page
Create src/app/(dashboard)/admin/roles/[id]/page.tsx with role detail and permission matrix editor
Implement permission matrix: rows = permission categories, columns = actions (view, create, edit, delete, approve)
